summary: Comprehensive testing of incoming supply status transitions (iteration 58). All 16 backend tests passed covering: plannedâ†’ordered (no receipt), orderedâ†’received (receipt movement created), cancellation transitions, invalid backward transitions (422), duplicate receipt prevention (409), non-existent supply (422), derive_balances status filtering (ordered=incoming, received/cancelled=not incoming), and full lifecycle test. Frontend tests verified: Incoming tab loads, status badges colored correctly, transition buttons visible per status, terminal states have no buttons.

issues: React hydration warnings about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality. Known issue from iteration 56-57.

critical_code_review_comments: VALID_TRANSITIONS dict in inventory_so_integration.py correctly defines: plannedâ†’{ordered,cancelled}, orderedâ†’{received,cancelled}, expectedâ†’{ordered,cancelled}, in_transitâ†’{received,cancelled}

seed_data_used: Each test creates unique items with UUID prefixes. Test workspaces created per test class with deactivation on teardown. Hormel Foods workspace used for frontend verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Incoming supply status transitions feature fully tested. Key endpoint: POST /api/incoming-supply/{supply_id}/status with {status: 'ordered'|'received'|'cancelled'}. Transitions: plannedâ†’ordered (no receipt), orderedâ†’received (creates receipt movement increasing on_hand), anyâ†’cancelled. Invalid transitions return 422, duplicate receipt returns 409. derive_balances now counts 'ordered' status as incoming (alongside planned, expected, in_transit). Frontend IncomingTable shows: 'Ordered'+'Cancel' buttons for planned, 'Received'+'Cancel' buttons for ordered, 'Ordered' only for legacy expected, 'Received' only for legacy in_transit, NO buttons for terminal states (received/cancelled). STATUS_COLORS includes planned (violet) and ordered (sky).
